ogTitle: Glen Niven vs Glen Russell: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Niven and Glen Russell.
heading: Glen Niven vs Glen Russell — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Niven, Queensland and Glen Russell, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Russell has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Glen Niven (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Niven or Glen Russell safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Niven has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Glen Russell scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Niven scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Russell scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Niven or Glen Russell?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Russell has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
